rules.rule_text:
rule BlankGrabber
{
	meta:
		author = "MalBeacon"
		description = "BlankGrabber system information file"
		reference = "https://github.com/MalBeacon/what-is-this-stealer"

	strings:
		$x1 = "Host Name:" ascii
		$x2 = "Registered Owner:" ascii
		$x3 = "Windows Directory:" ascii
		$x4 = "Domain:" ascii
		$x5 = "Logon Server:" ascii
		$x6 = "BIOS Version:" ascii

	condition:
		all of them
}
